name: tpu_v5p_pod
_comment: TPU v5p pod: 16×16×16 = 4096 chips on a single 3D-torus ICI fabric. 6 links/chip × 150 GB/s single-direction (~900 GB/s aggregate), ~1.0 us per-hop α. Every collective walks the ici fabric; collectives at group sizes that align with prefix-products of (16,16,16) route through the torus primitives (collectives/02_topology_mapping.md §3). Non-prefix-aligned G falls back to the flat-ring bound with a UserWarning.
